situational_context: Post-spike absorption phase. Gravel ride on Apr 25 (load 57, suffer 57) pushed ACWR to 1.44 — first significant training stimulus in weeks. Body absorbing well: training readiness recovering from 25 (Apr 25) to 51 (Apr 26). Chronic load climbing slowly (22, up from 17.8 at bootstrap). Weight trending down (105.2 kg, -1.7 kg in 10 days). Still at 1.4% of 2023 historical peak. HRV stable at 38 weekly avg. Rebuild phase: priority is ACWR normalization (<1.3) through recovery-focused sessions this week, then resume progressive loading. Baby cohabitant present; schedule flexibility essential.

recommendations.text: Prioritize ACWR normalization: keep all sessions Z1-Z2 (HR <135 bpm) this week. The gravel ride spiked ACWR to 1.44 on a low chronic base — absorb before progressing.
On sur site days (Apr 28, 30), prefer eBike over gravel for commute. eBike adds ~15 load (appropriate); gravel would add ~40-57 and re-spike ACWR.
recommendations.measurable: Commute suffer scores ≤15 on both sur site days

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein to ≥140g. 7-day average was 133g vs 150g target. At current weight loss rate and rebuild phase, protein is critical for muscle preservation.
recommendations.measurable: ≥5 of next 7 days with protein ≥140g logged

markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 1.44 post-gravel spike — above safe zone upper bound
Crashed to 25 post-gravel, recovered to 51 today — monitor trajectory
Down 1.67 kg in 10 days (1.17 kg/wk) — at upper edge, watch for acceleration
